name: the-office-bffs
description: Jenna Fischer and Angela Kinsey's behind-the-scenes scrapbook of The Office — the stories of how they were cast, their friendship, the Booze Cruise disaster, the Death Bus, Dwangela, and the creative genius of Greg Daniels.
useCase: Understanding creative collaboration, persistence in show business, friendship at work, behind-the-scenes of a hit TV show, and supporting coworkers through hard times.
knownRisks: Memories may be colored by time and nostalgia — all stories from one perspective
Some names and minor details have been changed to protect privacy
Primarily focuses on positive experiences, not the show's criticism or controversy
Contains mild language and references to adult situations
The book is a curated love letter, not an expose
